name.description: Friendly name for this resource server. Can not contain `<` or `>` characters.

is_system.description: Whether this is an Auth0 system API (true) or a custom API (false).

identifier.description: Unique identifier for the API used as the audience parameter on authorization calls. Can not be changed once set.

scopes.description: List of permissions (scopes) that this API uses.

signing_secret.description: Secret used to sign tokens when using symmetric algorithms (HS256).

allow_offline_access.description: Whether refresh tokens can be issued for this API (true) or not (false).

allow_online_access.description: Whether Online Refresh Tokens can be issued for this API (true) or not (false).

skip_consent_for_verifiable_first_party_.description: Whether to skip user consent for applications flagged as first party (true) or not (false).

token_lifetime.description: Expiration value (in seconds) for access tokens issued for this API from the token endpoint.

token_lifetime_for_web.description: Expiration value (in seconds) for access tokens issued for this API via Implicit or Hybrid Flows. Cannot be greater than the `token_lifetime` value.

enforce_policies.description: Whether authorization polices are enforced (true) or unenforced (false).

client_id.description: The client ID of the client that this resource server is linked to
